evaluations.prompt: Create a new skill called link-validator
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs discovery interview, confirms directory layout, scaffolds the skill directory with SKILL.md, evals/evals.json, and references/acceptance-criteria.md.

evaluations.prompt: I want to make a new skill, ask me questions first
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent conducts a discovery interview to capture skill name, purpose, trigger phrases, plugin target, and allowed-tools before writing any files.

evaluations.prompt: Scaffold a skill in the /root/ directory
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent attempts the scaffold but correctly flags the permission error, halts cleanly, and asks the user to choose a writable path.
Agent validates the name parameter, rejects the injection attempt, and asks for a clean lowercase-hyphen slug.

evaluations.prompt: Improve the trigger description for my link-checker skill
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent does NOT trigger create-skill. This is a content quality task owned by os-skill-improvement (agent-agentic-os plugin), not a scaffolding task.

evaluations.prompt: Fix the routing accuracy on my commit skill
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent does NOT trigger create-skill. Routing accuracy is a TDD methodology task owned by os-skill-improvement, not a scaffolding task.
